display_text: Crippling Crossbow, Tier 4: Neutral item. Active Hobble hits a targeted enemy for 75 magical damage, applies an 80% slow and reduces their Health Restoration by 40% for 4 seconds. The movement speed slow is intense initially but fades over the full duration, creating a powerful but time-limited ganking and catching tool. Stats: CD: 12s, Mana: 50, Damage: 75, Slow: 80%, Heal Reduction: 40%, Duration: 4s.
